title: Recru
description: Recru is a modern ATS system with automated technical candidate screening.
whyDesc: We provide a simple platform that optimizes the hiring process and automates technical candidate screening.
productsSubtitle: Powerful tools for effective hiring and technical screening
feedback: Send us your suggestions for improvements and bug reports!

advantages.analyticsDesc: Detailed statistics on the hiring funnel
advantages.flexibleSetupDesc: Customizable selection stages and evaluation criteria

products.aiScreeningDesc: AI-powered technical candidate assessment with automatic report generation.
products.jobManagementDesc: Create and manage jobs, track candidate statuses in real-time.
products.resumeParsingDesc: Automatic data extraction from resumes in any format with AI skills analysis.
products.schedulingDesc: Automatic coordination of meeting times with candidates and team.
products.hiringFunnelDesc: Customizable selection stages with automatic notifications and transitions.
products.notificationsDesc: Automatic status notifications to candidates at every stage of the hiring process.

dsp.title: Tech AI-screening
dsp.description: A modern ATS system with automated technical candidate screening. We cut hiring time and improve selection quality.

candidates.title: Candidate Management
candidates.description: Centralized database of all candidates with full interaction history

screening.title: AI-Screening
screening.description: Automatic assessment of candidates' technical skills

fast_hiring.title: Fast Hiring
fast_hiring.description: We cut the time to fill vacancies in half

parsing.title: Resume Parsing
parsing.description: Automatically extract data from resumes in any format

terms.title: Recru Terms of Use
terms.intro:
Use of the Recru platform is governed by the following terms. If you do not agree to all terms, you may not use our services.

These Terms of Use constitute a binding agreement between you and Recru, Inc. If you have questions, contact us at support@recru.com.

Your use of the platform means you agree to all Terms.
terms.termsChangeText:
We are constantly improving the platform, so the Terms may require changes. We reserve the right to change the Terms at any time with notification via email and/or on the website.

If you do not agree with the new Terms, you may stop using the platform.
terms.philosophyText: We strive to make Recru the simplest and most ethical hiring tool possible. The Terms will ensure a comfortable experience for you and for us.
terms.dataUsageText: It is prohibited to use Recru for unauthorized communications or data misuse. All interactions must be relevant to the hiring process and comply with data protection laws.
terms.userResponsibilityText: Recru is not responsible for accidental user actions in the system. You bear full responsibility for sending messages to candidates and managing data.
terms.usageLimitsText: Limits on the number of positions and candidates depend on the selected pricing plan. We cannot guarantee 100% delivery of all system notifications.
terms.accountSuspensionText: Recru reserves the right to suspend or close accounts for violation of the Terms of Use, including data misuse or fraudulent actions.
terms.subscriptionsText: When subscribing to a paid plan, you will be charged a monthly or annual fee until the subscription is cancelled.
terms.chargebacksText:
In case of a chargeback through the bank, we will:

1. Investigate the incident
2. Provide evidence to the bank
3. Automatically cancel the subscription
4. May impose a ban on re-use of the account
terms.supportText: Support is available via email at support@recru.com. Most answers can be found in the FAQ section on our website.
terms.confidentialityText: All information about the operation of the Recru platform is confidential. You agree not to disclose technical information, algorithms, and system operation methods to third parties.
terms.privacyText:
Recru takes privacy seriously. Details in the Privacy Policy.

We do not collect data from children under 13. If you are aware of such cases, contact support@recru.com.
terms.warrantyText: The platform is provided "as is" without any warranties. We do not guarantee uninterrupted operation or absence of errors.
terms.liabilityText: Recru is not liable for indirect damages, lost profits, or data loss arising from use of the platform.
terms.assignmentText: You may not assign your rights under this agreement without written consent from Recru.
terms.arbitrationText: All disputes are resolved in accordance with the laws of the country where Recru is registered through arbitration.
terms.miscellaneousText: These Terms constitute the complete agreement between you and Recru and supersede all prior agreements.

privacy.title: Recru Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We understand the importance of privacy for candidate and employer data. This policy explains what data we store and how we use it.
privacy.overviewText: Recru is an ATS system that helps manage the hiring process and conduct technical candidate screening. All data transfers occur via secure SSL connection.
privacy.candidateDataText: We store candidate contact information, resume data, screening results, and communication history. All data is protected and not transferred to third parties without your consent.
privacy.contentStorageText1: Yes. We store uploaded resumes and extracted data to ensure system functionality.
privacy.contentStorageText2: Resumes and candidate personal data are stored encrypted in a secure database.
privacy.contentStorageText3: You can request deletion of a specific candidate's data at any time through the system interface or by contacting support.
privacy.thirdParty: Does Recru Share Data with Third Parties?
privacy.thirdPartyText: We do not sell or transfer candidate personal data to third parties. Exceptions are services necessary for platform operation (cloud hosting, integrations) that operate in accordance with GDPR.
privacy.dataDeletionText: In accordance with GDPR, you can request deletion of all data. To do this, send a request to
privacy.dataDeletionSuffix: from the account whose data you wish to delete.
privacy.dataSecurityText: All data is protected by modern encryption methods and stored on servers with multi-level protection.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.noResults: No information found for this query

basics.whatNeed: What do I need to use Recru?
basics.createDrafts: Can I test the system before using it?
basics.autoFollowups: What is an automated hiring funnel?
basics.replaceSystem: Can Recru replace my current ATS?

candidates.createPosition: How do I create my first position?
candidates.attachments: Can I attach files to candidate messages?
candidates.notifications: How are candidates notified about their status?
candidates.limits: How many candidates can I process?

reports.access: How do I view hiring analytics?

support.otherProducts: What additional features does Recru have?

basics.whatNeed: You only need an email to register. The system works in the browser.
basics.changes: Recru is a web platform for managing positions, candidates, and automated technical screening using AI.
basics.sendAsReplies: Technical screening is an automatic assessment of a candidate's skills based on resume analysis and answers to technical questions using AI.
basics.createDrafts: Yes! The free plan allows you to test the basic system features.
basics.autoFollowups: The automated hiring funnel sends notifications to candidates at each stage of selection and moves them between stages automatically.
basics.replaceSystem: Yes. Recru is a full-fledged ATS system with additional AI screening capabilities.

candidates.createPosition: Click 'Create Position' in the dashboard, fill in the information, and publish the position.
candidates.attachments: Yes. You can attach files and documents to candidate messages and templates.
candidates.notifications: The platform sends automated notifications to candidates at each hiring stage. Message templates are fully customizable.
candidates.limits: Limits depend on the plan: from 50 candidates/month on free to unlimited on premium.

reports.access: Open the 'Analytics' section in the menu. Statistics on hiring funnel, screening, and position closing time are available there.

pricing.free: Yes! The free plan includes 3 positions and 50 candidates per month with basic screening.

support.otherProducts: Recru includes: position management, resume parsing, AI screening, hiring funnel, interview scheduling, and analytics.
support.getSupport: Write to support@recru.com or use the support chat in the system.
